headline: IBM announces the issuance of €3.5 billion in Euro Notes and $3.25 billion in USD Notes across multiple tranches.
investor_impact: This combined ~$7 billion debt raise allows IBM to secure long-term financing across a well-laddered maturity schedule (2028-2056). The capital will likely support general corporate purposes, refinancing of upcoming maturities, or strategic M&A, reflecting strong credit market access without diluting equity.
key_figures: €3,500,000,000 aggregate principal amount of Euro Notes
$3,250,000,000 aggregate principal amount of USD Notes
